name: claude-harness
description: Verifier-in-the-loop harness for Claude Code — guard/reminder hooks, senior-code-reviewer sub-agent, and a pre-commit receipt gate.

plugins.name: claude-harness
plugins.description: Lifecycle hooks (destructive-command + secret guards, syntax check, verify-due), a senior-code-reviewer sub-agent, dev-loop / spec-driven / verifier-review-loop skills, and a /security-review command. Pair with the pre-commit receipt gate (see repo README).
